  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Support Officer",
  "description": "Newedge is a financial institution established in 2019 and licensed by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) to operate as a Finance Company in Nigeria. Newedge provide Loans, Investment and Financial Advisory solutions to clients across the private and public sectors of the economy. The Company is fitted out with far-sightedfinancial experts with insightful knowledge of the macroeconomic variables to deliver a tailor-made financial solution to our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Sales Support Officer

Job Locations:&nbsp;Ibadan - Oyo, Kaduna and Kano
Employment Type: Contract

Description


	We are looking for motivated and dedicated professionals to join our growing team.
	If you&#39;re passionate, eager to learn, and ready to build a rewarding career in a dynamic corporate environment, this opportunity is for you!


Ideal Candidates


	M.Sc., B.Sc. HND, ND qualification
	Experience:1-4 years
	Must be Willing to learn and grow within the organization.
	Thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
	Demonstrate professionalism, responsibility, and strong work ethics.
	Proactive and ready to contribute fresh ideas.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;samuel.afolayan@newedgefinance.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Sales Support Officer Job at Newedge Finance Limited




        
    

        
        Newedge is a financial institution established in 2019 and licensed by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) to operate as a Finance Company in Nigeria. Newedge provide Loans, Investment and Financial Advisory solutions to clients across the private and public sectors of the economy. The Company is fitted out with far-sightedfinancial experts with insightful knowledge of the macroeconomic variables to deliver a tailor-made financial solution to our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Support Officer

Job Locations: Ibadan - Oyo, Kaduna and Kano
Employment Type: Contract

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for motivated and dedicated professionals to join our growing team.
	If you're passionate, eager to learn, and ready to build a rewarding career in a dynamic corporate environment, this opportunity is for you!


Ideal Candidates


	M.Sc., B.Sc. HND, ND qualification
	Experience:1-4 years
	Must be Willing to learn and grow within the organization.
	Thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
	Demonstrate professionalism, responsibility, and strong work ethics.
	Proactive and ready to contribute fresh ideas.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Land Surveyor",
  "description": "Sageto Limited is a Private Limited Liability engineering construction company registered to carry out building, civil, mechanical, and electrical engineering services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Land Surveyor

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a competent and detail-oriented Land Surveyor to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for conducting land measurements, preparing survey reports, and providing accurate data to support construction and development projects.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct land and site surveys using modern surveying equipment (Total Station, GPS, Levels, etc.).
	Prepare and maintain accurate survey data, maps, and reports.
	Establish reference points and benchmarks for construction projects.
	Interpret construction drawings and provide technical input.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory and legal requirements.
	Collaborate with engineers, architects, and project managers.
	Monitor and verify construction progress against survey data.
	Maintain proper documentation of all survey activities.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND qualification&nbsp;in Surveying &amp; Geoinformatics or related field.
	3&ndash;5 years relevant experience in construction or real estate.
	Proficiency in surveying software (AutoCAD, Civil 3D, GIS tools, etc.).
	Strong knowledge of land laws and surveying standards.
	Ability to operate modern surveying instruments.
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Additional Requirements:


	Professional certification or registration with relevant bodies is an added advantage.


Remuneration
Competitive salary commensurate with experience.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@sagetolimited.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	Sageto Limited is an equal opportunity employer.

Land Surveyor Job at Sageto Limited




        
    

        
        Sageto Limited is a Private Limited Liability engineering construction company registered to carry out building, civil, mechanical, and electrical engineering services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Land Surveyor

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a competent and detail-oriented Land Surveyor to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for conducting land measurements, preparing survey reports, and providing accurate data to support construction and development projects.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Conduct land and site surveys using modern surveying equipment (Total Station, GPS, Levels, etc.).
	Prepare and maintain accurate survey data, maps, and reports.
	Establish reference points and benchmarks for construction projects.
	Interpret construction drawings and provide technical input.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory and legal requirements.
	Collaborate with engineers, architects, and project managers.
	Monitor and verify construction progress against survey data.
	Maintain proper documentation of all survey activities.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND qualification in Surveying & Geoinformatics or related field.
	3–5 years relevant experience in construction or real estate.
	Proficiency in surveying software (AutoCAD, Civil 3D, GIS tools, etc.).
	Strong knowledge of land laws and surveying standards.
	Ability to operate modern surveying instruments.
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Additional Requirements:


	Professional certification or registration with relevant bodies is an added advantage.


Remuneration
Competitive salary commensurate with experience.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	Sageto Limited is an equal opportunity employer.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Medical Laboratory Scientist",
  "description": "SIA Global Healthcare Limited supports hospitals, diagnostic centres, and healthcare startups with practical consulting across operations, accreditation, technology, finance, and growth strategy.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Laboratory Scientist

Job Location:&nbsp;Markurdi, Benue

Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Method of Application&nbsp;

  "description": "African Steel Mills Nigeria Limited - Our client, HFP Paving Stones, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibeju-Lekki, Lagos

Job Description


	We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Junior Electrical Engineer to join our team at our paving stone production facility in Ibeju-Lekki.
	The ideal candidate will support electrical operations, maintenance, and troubleshooting of plant equipment to ensure efficient and uninterrupted production.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in the installation, maintenance, and repair of electrical systems and machinery.
	Support troubleshooting of electrical faults in production equipment and control panels.
	Conduct routine inspections and preventive maintenance of electrical components.
	Ensure proper functioning of motors, generators, and automated systems.
	Read and interpret electrical drawings, diagrams, and specifications.
	Monitor equipment performance and report abnormalities to senior engineers.
	Ensure compliance with safety standards and electrical regulations.
	Maintain accurate records of maintenance activities and repairs.
	Collaborate with the production team to minimize downtime and improve efficiency.
	Assist in implementing electrical upgrades and process improvements.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND qualification in Electrical Engineering or related field.
	0&ndash;2 years of relevant experience (industrial or manufacturing experience is an advantage).
	Basic knowledge of electrical systems, control panels, and industrial equipment.
	Ability to troubleshoot and solve technical problems.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;michael.eromosele@africanindustries.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Electrical Engineer Job at African Steel Mills Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        African Steel Mills Nigeria Limited - Our client, HFP Paving Stones, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Ibeju-Lekki, Lagos

Job Description


	We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Junior Electrical Engineer to join our team at our paving stone production facility in Ibeju-Lekki.
	The ideal candidate will support electrical operations, maintenance, and troubleshooting of plant equipment to ensure efficient and uninterrupted production.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist in the installation, maintenance, and repair of electrical systems and machinery.
	Support troubleshooting of electrical faults in production equipment and control panels.
	Conduct routine inspections and preventive maintenance of electrical components.
	Ensure proper functioning of motors, generators, and automated systems.
	Read and interpret electrical drawings, diagrams, and specifications.
	Monitor equipment performance and report abnormalities to senior engineers.
	Ensure compliance with safety standards and electrical regulations.
	Maintain accurate records of maintenance activities and repairs.
	Collaborate with the production team to minimize downtime and improve efficiency.
	Assist in implementing electrical upgrades and process improvements.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND qualification in Electrical Engineering or related field.
	0–2 years of relevant experience (industrial or manufacturing experience is an advantage).
	Basic knowledge of electrical systems, control panels, and industrial equipment.
	Ability to troubleshoot and solve technical problems.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Video Editor & Camera Operator",
  "description": "Bible Davids Ministries (BDM) is a cutting-edge global outreach organization committed to transforming lives through the supernatural power of God, dynamic media, strategic evangelism, and community impact. As the evangelistic arm working hand-in-hand with Supernatural Nation, BDM is pioneering in television broadcasting, media production, publishing, education, humanitarian initiatives, and innovative call center operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Video Editor &amp; Camera Operator

Job Location: Abuja
Job Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Video Editor &amp; Camera Operator will be responsible for transforming raw footage into compelling, high-quality video content that communicates the vision and anointing of BDM.
	This role requires both technical mastery and creative storytelling, working closely with the media production team to produce broadcasts, social media content, promotional videos, and course materials that impact audiences globally.


Key Responsibilities
Video Editing &amp; Post-Production:


	Edit sermons, conferences, events, and e-courses into engaging final products.
	Create promotional videos, teasers, trailers, and highlight reels for social media and broadcast.
	Assemble raw footage, add effects, transitions, graphics, sound design, and color correction.
	Produce platform-specific edits (YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, TV broadcast).


Motion Graphics &amp; Visual Enhancements:


	Design and integrate motion graphics, lower-thirds, text overlays, and branded templates.
	Work with the graphics team to create unified visual styles across all media.
	Ensure all video content reflects BDM&rsquo;s prophetic identity and standard of excellence.


Collaboration &amp; Media Production Support:


	Collaborate with videographers, producers, and creative teams during the entire production cycle.
	Provide input on filming angles, lighting, and audio for smoother editing outcomes.
	Support live-stream productions when needed.


Asset &amp; File Management:


	Organize, archive, and manage video footage and project files.
	Maintain efficiency by establishing workflows for quick turnaround times.
	Ensure all media assets are properly backed up and accessible to the team.


Innovation &amp; Growth:


	Stay up to date with video trends, editing techniques, and digital storytelling strategies.
	Suggest new ways to present ministry content for maximum impact and virality.
	Experiment with creative formats to increase engagement across platforms.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements
Education &amp; Experience:


	Diploma or Degree in Film, Media, Communications, or related field (preferred but not mandatory).
	Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in video editing.
	Proven portfolio of edited video content across different platforms.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.
	Strong knowledge of color grading, audio balancing, and motion graphics.
	Ability to create fast-paced edits for social media and long-form edits for courses and sermons.
	Familiarity with YouTube optimization and video formatting standards.
	Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and storytelling instincts.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and deliver under tight deadlines.


Spiritual Alignment:


	A committed believer with a passion for advancing the Kingdom through media.
	Alignment with the prophetic and revival vision of Bible Davids Ministries.
	Willingness to serve in a Spirit-led, fast-paced environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume / CV and a&nbsp;cover letter explaining their relevant experience and why they believe they are called to serve at Bible Davids Ministries in Abuja&nbsp;to:&nbsp;hr@bibledavids.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-08",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

	This role requires both technical mastery and creative storytelling, working closely with the media production team to produce broadcasts, social media content, promotional videos, and course materials that impact audiences globally.

Qualifications & Requirements

	Diploma or Degree in Film, Media, Communications, or related field (preferred but not mandatory).

	Proven portfolio of edited video content across different platforms.


Skills & Competencies:


	Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.
	Strong knowledge of color grading, audio balancing, and motion graphics.
	Ability to create fast-paced edits for social media and long-form edits for courses and sermons.
	Familiarity with YouTube optimization and video formatting standards.
	Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and storytelling instincts.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and deliver under tight deadlines.


Spiritual Alignment:


	A committed believer with a passion for advancing the Kingdom through media.
	Alignment with the prophetic and revival vision of Bible Davids Ministries.
	Willingness to serve in a Spirit-led, fast-paced environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume / CV and a cover letter explaining their relevant experience and why they believe they are called to serve at Bible Davids Ministries in Abuja to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
